test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/executor/test_play_iterator.py b/test/units/executor/test_play_iterator.py
--- a/test/units/executor/test_play_iterator.py
+++ b/test/units/executor/test_play_iterator.py
@@ -19,9 +19,12 @@ from __future__ import (absolute_import, division, print_function)
 __metaclass__ = type
 
+from enum import IntEnum, IntFlag
+
 from units.compat import unittest
 from units.compat.mock import patch, MagicMock
 
-from ansible.executor.play_iterator import HostState, PlayIterator
+import ansible.executor.play_iterator as play_iterator_module
+from ansible.executor.play_iterator import HostState, PlayIterator
 from ansible.playbook import Playbook
 from ansible.playbook.play_context import PlayContext
 
@@ -461,3 +464,75 @@ class TestPlayIterator(unittest.TestCase):
         # test a regular insertion
         s_copy = s.copy()
         res_state = itr._insert_tasks_into_state(s_copy, task_list=[MagicMock()])
+
+    def test_iterating_states_deprecation_class_attr(self):
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'IteratingStates')
+        assert PlayIterator.ITERATING_SETUP == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.SETUP
+        assert PlayIterator.ITERATING_TASKS == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.TASKS
+        assert PlayIterator.ITERATING_RESCUE == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.RESCUE
+        assert PlayIterator.ITERATING_ALWAYS == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.ALWAYS
+        assert PlayIterator.ITERATING_COMPLETE == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.COMPLETE
+
+    def test_failed_states_deprecation_class_attr(self):
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'FailedStates')
+        assert PlayIterator.FAILED_NONE == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.NONE
+        assert PlayIterator.FAILED_SETUP == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.SETUP
+        assert PlayIterator.FAILED_TASKS == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.TASKS
+        assert PlayIterator.FAILED_RESCUE == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.RESCUE
+        assert PlayIterator.FAILED_ALWAYS == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.ALWAYS
+
+    def test_iterating_states_deprecation_instance_attr(self):
+        iterator = PlayIterator(MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock())
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'IteratingStates')
+        assert iterator.ITERATING_SETUP == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.SETUP
+        assert iterator.ITERATING_TASKS == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.TASKS
+        assert iterator.ITERATING_RESCUE == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.RESCUE
+        assert iterator.ITERATING_ALWAYS == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.ALWAYS
+        assert iterator.ITERATING_COMPLETE == play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.COMPLETE
+
+    def test_failed_states_deprecation_instance_attr(self):
+        iterator = PlayIterator(MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock())
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'FailedStates')
+        assert iterator.FAILED_NONE == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.NONE
+        assert iterator.FAILED_SETUP == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.SETUP
+        assert iterator.FAILED_TASKS == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.TASKS
+        assert iterator.FAILED_RESCUE == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.RESCUE
+        assert iterator.FAILED_ALWAYS == play_iterator_module.FailedStates.ALWAYS
+
+    @patch('ansible.executor.play_iterator.display.deprecated')
+    def test_deprecation_version_class_attr(self, mock_deprecated):
+        _ = PlayIterator.ITERATING_TASKS
+        mock_deprecated.assert_called_once()
+        assert mock_deprecated.call_args.kwargs['version'] == 2.14
+
+    @patch('ansible.executor.play_iterator.display.deprecated')
+    def test_deprecation_version_instance_attr(self, mock_deprecated):
+        iterator = PlayIterator(MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock(), MagicMock())
+        _ = iterator.FAILED_TASKS
+        mock_deprecated.assert_called_once()
+        assert mock_deprecated.call_args.kwargs['version'] == 2.14
+
+    def test_iterating_states_is_intenum(self):
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'IteratingStates')
+        assert issubclass(play_iterator_module.IteratingStates, IntEnum)
+        assert not issubclass(play_iterator_module.IteratingStates, IntFlag)
+        assert play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.COMPLETE == 4
+
+    def test_host_state_uses_unprefixed_enum_names(self):
+        hs = HostState(blocks=[0])
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'IteratingStates')
+        assert hasattr(play_iterator_module, 'FailedStates')
+        hs.run_state = play_iterator_module.IteratingStates.TASKS
+        hs.fail_state = play_iterator_module.FailedStates.RESCUE | play_iterator_module.FailedStates.ALWAYS
+        state_text = str(hs)
+        assert 'run_state=TASKS' in state_text
+        assert 'fail_state=RESCUE|ALWAYS' in state_text
+        assert 'ALWAYS' in state_text
+        assert 'RESCUE' in state_text
+        assert 'IteratingStates.' not in state_text
+        assert 'FailedStates.' not in state_text
+        assert 'ITERATING_' not in state_text
+        assert 'FAILED_' not in state_text
+
+    def test_module_public_api_all(self):
+        assert play_iterator_module.__all__ == ['PlayIterator', 'IteratingStates', 'FailedStates']
